fall_of_constanplea.title: The Fall of Constanplea
fall_of_constanplea.author: Scholar Theophanes of Byzantra
fall_of_constanplea.description: A firsthand account of the final siege and fall of Constanplea, written by a survivor of the Kalovar conquest.

origins_of_the_kalovars.title: Origins of the Kalovar People
origins_of_the_kalovars.author: Archivist Demetrios Palaiologos
origins_of_the_kalovars.description: A scholarly history of the Kalovar people — from nomadic clans on the steppes north of Yixuan to the rulers of a world empire.

new_order_of_kostantora.title: The New Order: Life in Kostantora
new_order_of_kostantora.author: Miriam of the Lower City
new_order_of_kostantora.description: A personal account of life in Kostantora fifteen years after the conquest — the slave markets, religious imposition, and daily survival.

chronicles_of_byzantra.title: Chronicles of Byzantra
chronicles_of_byzantra.author: The Byzantra Academy of History
chronicles_of_byzantra.description: A concise history of the Byzantra Empire, from the first Basileus Konrad the Unifier to the fall of Basileus Konstantinos IX.

kalovar_faith_and_law.title: The Faith and Law of the Kalovanim Empire
kalovar_faith_and_law.author: Imperial Office of Trade and Foreign Relations
kalovar_faith_and_law.description: An official Kalovar guide for foreign visitors — customs, laws, and strongly-worded advice on not discussing the city's prior history.

warriors_code_of_byzantra.title: The Warrior's Code of Byzantra
warriors_code_of_byzantra.author: General Andronikos Doukas, Commander of the Eastern Legions
warriors_code_of_byzantra.description: A field manual and philosophical treatise on warfare, discipline, and honour, written by one of Byzantra's last great military commanders.

voices_from_the_steppes.title: Voices from the Steppes
voices_from_the_steppes.author: Compiled by Travelling Scholar Erasimos
voices_from_the_steppes.description: A rare collection of Kalovar oral poems, songs, and tales gathered from steppe wanderers — a window into the soul of a people the world feared.

the_merchants_road.title: The Merchant's Road: A Traveller's Guide to the Known World
the_merchants_road.author: Niketas the Far-Wanderer
the_merchants_road.description: A practical guide to trade routes, city markets, bandit territories, and useful phrases in six languages. Worn and heavily annotated.

last_basileus.title: The Last Basileus: A Life of Konstantinos IX
last_basileus.author: Lady Eudokia Asanina, Court Historian
last_basileus.description: A biography of Byzantra's final emperor — his campaigns, his impossible choices, and his death on the walls of Constanplea.
